entities.name: SPECTRAL VARIATION HYPOTHESIS
entities.description: A hypothesis assuming that spectral variability is a result of variation in species richness

entities.name: SPECTRAL VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation in spectral signatures used to infer species richness

entities.name: PLANT RICHNESS
entities.description: The number of different plant species in a given area, also referred to as species richness

entities.name: SATELLITE DATASETS
entities.description: Data collected via satellites used as a proxy for estimating plant richness

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the biodiversity hotspots studied are located

entities.name: HIMALAYA
entities.description: A global biodiversity hotspot located in India

entities.name: INDO-BURMA
entities.description: A global biodiversity hotspot located in India

entities.name: WESTERN GHATS
entities.description: A global biodiversity hotspot located in India

entities.name: GENERALIZED LINEAR MODELS
entities.description: Statistical models used to correlate vegetation and physiographic indices with plant richness

entities.name: VEGETATION INDICES
entities.description: Remote sensing based indices used to explain variance in plant richness

entities.name: PHYSIOGRAPHIC INDICES
entities.description: Indices based on physical geography used to explain variance in plant richness

entities.name: BAMBOO
entities.description: A type of vegetation found in the Indo-Burma hotspot

entities.name: NORMALIZED DIFFERENCE VEGETATION INDEX
entities.description: A specific vegetation index that explained the highest variance in plant richness for Bamboo vegetation in Indo-Burma

entities.name: DRY DECIDUOUS FOREST
entities.description: A vegetation class in the Western Ghats

entities.name: NORMALIZED DIFFERENCE WATER INDEX
entities.description: A specific vegetation index that explained the highest variance in plant richness for dry deciduous forests in Western Ghats

entities.name: GRASSLANDS
entities.description: A vegetation class in the Himalaya

entities.name: MODIFIED SOIL ADJUSTED VEGETATION INDEX
entities.description: A specific vegetation index that explained the highest variance in plant richness for grasslands in the Himalaya

entities.name: SCRUBS
entities.description: A vegetation class with low species richness

entities.name: OPEN CANOPY VEGETATION
entities.description: Vegetation classes with low species richness, including grasslands, scrubs, and dry deciduous forests

entities.name: MODERATELY DENSE CANOPY
entities.description: Vegetation classes with moderate species richness
